scope: Meeting action item status duplicate-submit and concurrent duplicate idempotency.
expected: Setting a meeting action item to its current status should be an idempotent success with no duplicate status-change audit. Concurrent duplicate status updates should return successful readback for both requests, persist one final action item state, and emit exactly one status-change audit for the transition.

redEvidence.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts -t "treats duplicate meeting action item status updates"
redEvidence.observed: Failed before fix: sequential duplicate PATCH returned 200 but produced two collaboration.meeting_action_item_updated audit events for a single transition.

actual: Pass: duplicate same-status PATCH returns 200 with done readback and one status-change audit; concurrent duplicate PATCH requests both return 200, read back one done action item, and keep audit count to one event for the concurrent transition.

verification.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts -t "treats duplicate meeting action item status updates"
verification.notes: Vitest emitted the existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts, unrelated to this slice.

verification.observed: Seeded dev tenants, users, org structure, CRM, projects and communications data.
verification.notes: Restored local dev/browser database after the DB test harness truncated collaboration state.

verification.command: ConvertFrom-Json for reconciliation matrix and this evidence JSON

verification.observed: No whitespace errors; Git reported only CRLF-to-LF normalization warnings for existing files.

coverageImpact: Adds fresh DB/API evidence and a backend fix for the meetings action-item status write-flow. Broader RISK-WRITE-FLOW-RACE-IDEMPOTENCY remains open for other write surfaces such as call participant-state, meeting create, task update, control-surface publish/rollback, and retrospective close.
